anchor.note: local sprite-space contact point at the base of the phone body; scene placement is the telephone shelf in env_bar_bg_mid (native x168-191,y122-130, ~23px wide) and anchor-telephone (content/graybox-layout.json, native ~180,130).

review_notes: Dark bakelite desk phone: soot_1 base body (soot_2 lit top edge), soot_3 dial disc with soot_0 finger holes (no legible numerals per ART_BIBLE §7), handset resting on two soot_2 cradle prongs, soot_0 zigzag cord. Sized to fit the ~23px-wide shelf. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x.
